author: Besting
text: REVISION 2026-06-05 (config/store split, bl-2e26 §17): migration now emits TWO branches — fresh orphan balls/config (seed config incl. tasks_branch=balls/tasks) + migrated markdown tasks/ on balls/tasks (legacy used balls/tasks for JSON — name collides). The published origin/balls/tasks MUST NOT be force-rewritten (shared history); cutover of the shared store is a coordinated push, not a force-rewrite. Config map adds tasks_branch; stale_threshold -> tracker territory. Now also depends on branch-split corrections bl-f970/bl-30e2/bl-3dd9/bl-9329/bl-cd21/bl-8c0b.

author: Unlearn
text: NOTE (bl-8540, merged e9b44cc): §16 migration's config map now targets config/plugins.toml [hooks], NOT the symlink registry. Legacy 'plugins: {name:{enabled,config_file}}' map -> plugins.toml [hooks] entries naming each enabled plugin in the op-phases it handles (op/phase from <name> protocol; list position = run order) + gitignored bin/<name> + each config_file -> config/plugins/<name>/. §16 doc text already updated by bl-8540.

author: Delirium
text: Restored from erroneous status=deferred. The github-issues plugin falsely reported the GH issue 'no longer found' (verified OPEN on GitHub) due to a list pagination bug; plugin disabled, bug filed.

author: Mythology
text: §16 migration: legacy→greenfield base migrator + cutover runbook (dogfooded end-to-end)
